sql:
SELECT license_type, id, valid_to
FROM licenses
WHERE tenant_id = :tenant_id
  AND status = 'ACTIVE'
  AND valid_from <= now()
  AND valid_to >= now()
  AND (
    license_type = 'STARTUP'
    OR (
      module_code = :module_code
      AND license_type != 'CORE'
      AND license_type != 'STARTUP'
    )
  )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN license_type = 'STARTUP' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, valid_to DESC
LIMIT 1
